hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"[MANDATORY READ ORDER] 1) CLAUDE.md 2) .ai/MEMORY.md 3) MEMORY.md [NON-NEGOTIABLE RULES] §1 GRAPHY-FIRST: ALL codebase searches MUST use graphify (NEVER grep/find/Glob). Commands: graphify query, graphify explain, graphify path. §2 SHARED MODULE: ALL constants/types/enums in shared/ — import { KAFKA_TOPICS, PORTS, REDIS_KEYS } from /app/shared. §3 After code edits, run graphify update ."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"🚫 BLOCKED — Grep/Glob is FORBIDDEN for codebase search. MANDATORY: Use graphify FIRST: `graphify query \"<concept>\"` (broad) → `graphify explain \"<symbol>\"` (deep) → `graphify path \"A\" \"B\"` (trace). Grep/Glob allowed ONLY as ONE-SHOT verification AFTER graphify pointed to a specific symbol. If graphify CLI is blocked, read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md directly. §1 of the contract."}}'

if grep -qE '"file_path":[[:space:]]*"(.*[\\/])?shared[\\/]'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"📦 Touching shared/ — this is the single source of truth for ALL layers. Import from here: require(\"/app/shared\"). See shared/README.md."}}'; fi

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"⚠️ REMINDER: After ANY code change, run `graphify update .` to refresh the knowledge graph. This is mandatory per §1 of the contract."}}'

instructions.sharedModule: ALL constants, types, and enums live in shared/. Import: require('/app/shared'). See shared/README.md for full reference.
instructions.graphifyMandate: ABSOLUTE MANDATE: You MUST call graphify before any codebase access. This is non-negotiable.
